title: Grade 5 Activities
description: Decimals, multi-digit operations, fractions, volume, and coordinate geometry

levels.title: Place Value & Decimals
levels.goal: Understand decimal place value to thousandths, compare/round decimals, and use powers of 10.
skills: Round decimals to a given place

activities.title: Powers of Ten Shift
activities.description: Multiply or divide by 10, 100, 1000 and watch the digits move.

activities.title: Build the Decimal
activities.description: Drag digits into places to match the number.

activities.title: Decimal Compare Duel
activities.description: Which is bigger? Use >, <, or =.

activities.title: Rounding Roller
activities.description: Round to the nearest tenth, hundredth, or whole number.

activities.title: Expanded Form Match
activities.description: Match standard, expanded, and word form.

activities.title: Decimal Grids Lab
activities.description: Shade the grid to show a decimal (and see the fraction).

activities.title: Estimate the Sum
activities.description: Estimate first. Then check.

activities.title: Decimal Patterns
activities.description: Follow the rule to grow a decimal pattern.

levels.title: Multi-Digit & Decimal Operations + Expressions
levels.goal: Fluently multiply and divide multi-digit whole numbers, operate with decimals, and write/interpret expressions.

activities.title: Partial Products Builder
activities.description: Build an area model and add the partial products.

activities.title: Algorithm Check
activities.description: Choose which multiplication work is correct.

activities.title: Division: First Estimate
activities.description: Estimate the quotient before dividing.

activities.title: Partial Quotients Path
activities.description: Subtract chunks to reach the quotient.

activities.title: Decimal Add/Sub Align
activities.description: Line up decimals and solve.

activities.title: Decimal × Whole
activities.description: Multiply a decimal by a whole number using models.

activities.title: Decimal ÷ Whole
activities.description: Share a decimal amount equally.

activities.title: Expression Builder
activities.description: Turn words into an expression (and evaluate).

levels.title: Fractions Toolkit
levels.goal: Treat fractions as numbers on the number line and as operators. Understand fractions as division, add/subtract unlike denominators, multiply fractions, and explore division with unit fractions.

activities.title: Equivalent Fractions Lab
activities.description: Stretch and shrink fraction bars to make equivalents.

activities.title: Fraction as Division
activities.description: See that a/b means a divided by b.

activities.title: Common Denominator Maker
activities.description: Choose a common denominator to compare or add.

activities.title: Add Unlike Fractions
activities.description: Add fractions with different denominators (with models).

activities.title: Subtract Mixed Numbers
activities.description: Subtract with regrouping (borrow a whole into fractions).

activities.title: Multiply Fractions Area
activities.description: Find "a fraction of a fraction" using an area model.

activities.title: Fraction Scaling
activities.description: Will the product get bigger or smaller?

activities.title: Divide Unit Fractions
activities.description: How many 1/3s are in 2?

activities.title: Fraction Word Problems
activities.description: Draw a tape diagram to solve.

levels.title: Measurement, Data & Volume
levels.goal: Convert units, interpret line plots with fractional measurements, and understand volume through unit cubes and formulas.
skills: Use fraction operations to answer line plot questions

activities.title: Unit Conversion Chain
activities.description: Convert step-by-step (km to m to cm, etc.).

activities.title: Multi-Step Conversions
activities.description: Solve real-world problems with conversions.

activities.title: Build a Line Plot
activities.description: Place X marks for each measurement.

activities.title: Line Plot Questions
activities.description: Use the plot to answer fraction questions.

activities.title: Volume with Unit Cubes
activities.description: Count cubes by layers to find volume.

activities.title: Volume Formula Finder
activities.description: Use V = l × w × h (and explain what each means).

activities.title: Compose Volumes
activities.description: Add volumes of two prisms stuck together.

activities.title: Reasonableness & Units
activities.description: Pick the best unit and spot impossible answers.

levels.title: Coordinate Plane & Geometry
levels.goal: Use coordinates to solve problems on a grid and classify 2D figures based on properties.
skills: Plot points and read coordinates (first quadrant)
Use coordinates to find horizontal/vertical distances
Classify quadrilaterals and triangles by properties

activities.title: Plot the Point
activities.description: Plot (x, y) points to hit targets.

activities.title: Read the Coordinates
activities.description: Click the point and name its (x, y).

activities.title: Coordinate Distance
activities.description: How far apart are two points (horizontally or vertically)?

activities.title: Mystery Shape
activities.description: Plot points to reveal a shape. What is it?

activities.title: Coordinate Word Problems
activities.description: Use the grid like a map to solve problems.

activities.title: Pattern Pairs & Graphing
activities.description: Make two patterns and graph the pairs.

activities.title: Classify Quadrilaterals
activities.description: Sort shapes by properties (parallel sides, right angles...).

activities.title: Shape Hierarchy Tree
activities.description: Build the "family tree" of shapes.

activities.title: Always / Sometimes / Never
activities.description: Decide if a statement is always, sometimes, or never true.
